question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not provide a list of the main sections of the thesis. It only contains a problem statement, relevance, and a development schedule, so the reader cannot identify the intended chapters.

question: Description
feedback: There is no brief description of the contents of any section. The material focuses on the problem and a timetable but lacks any summary of what each chapter will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: The overall structure of the thesis is not evident from the provided text. Without chapter headings or an outline, the reader cannot infer how the work will be organized.
